Title: Scriban: Built-in operations bypass LoopLimit and delay cancellation, enabling Denial of Service
Description: Scriban's `LoopLimit` only applies to script loop statements, not to expensive iteration performed inside operators and builtins. An attacker can submit a single expression such as `{{ 1..1000000 | array.size }}` and force large amounts of CPU work even when `LoopLimit` is set to a very small value.
